templates.nl_query: Show me apartments in Zurich up to 6k with min 2 rooms
templates.sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER('Zurich') AND price <= 6000 AND bedrooms >= 2 LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Find apartments filtered strictly by city, price, and room count without semantic search
templates.manifest: Find property listings filtered by city, price, and bedroom count

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER($1) AND price <= $2 AND bedrooms >= $3 LIMIT 25;
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show me apartments in $1 up to $2 with min $3 rooms

templates.sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings ORDER BY ((0.6 * (1 - (description_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'gemini-embedding-001', content => 'Lovely wooden cabin')::vector))) + (0.4 * (1 - (image_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'multimodalembedding@001', content => 'Lovely wooden cabbin')::vector)))) DESC LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Search for properties based solely on semantic and visual similarity to a text description
templates.manifest: Find property listings ordered by semantic similarity to a search phrase

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings ORDER BY ((0.6 * (1 - (description_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'gemini-embedding-001', content => $1)::vector))) + (0.4 * (1 - (image_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'multimodalembedding@001', content => $1)::vector)))) DESC LIMIT 25;

templates.nl_query: Show me modern apartments in Zurich with industrial look up to 6k with min 2 rooms
templates.sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER('Zurich') AND price <= 6000 AND bedrooms >= 2 ORDER BY ((0.6 * (1 - (description_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'gemini-embedding-001', content => 'modern apartments with industrial look')::vector))) + (0.4 * (1 - (image_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'multimodalembedding@001', content => 'modern apartments with industrial look')::vector)))) DESC LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Find apartments in a specific city with price and room constraints, ordered by visual and semantic similarity to a description
templates.manifest: Find property listings in a given city with price and room limits, ordered by semantic similarity to a search phrase

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER($2) AND price <= $3 AND bedrooms >= $4 ORDER BY ((0.6 * (1 - (description_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'gemini-embedding-001', content => $1)::vector))) + (0.4 * (1 - (image_embedding <=> google_ml.embedding(model_id => 'multimodalembedding@001', content => $1)::vector)))) DESC LIMIT 25;
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show me $1 in $2 up to $3 with min $4 rooms

value_searches.query: WITH TrigramMetrics AS (    SELECT T."city" AS original_value,     (T."city" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist     FROM "property_listings" T     WHERE T."city" % $value::text) SELECT original_value AS value, 'property_listings.city' AS columns, 'City' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics

WITH TrigramMetrics AS (    SELECT T."canton" AS original_value,     (T."canton" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist     FROM "property_listings" T     WHERE T."canton" % $value::text) SELECT original_value AS value, 'property_listings.canton' AS columns, 'Canton' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics
